html:
(father of strength , i.e. strong).
  1. Father of Kish, and consequently grandfather of Saul, (1ïṡẄSamuel 9:1) as well as of Abner, SaulïṡẄs commander-in-chief. (1ïṡẄSamuel 14:51) (B.C. 1093-1055.)
  2. One of DavidïṡẄs mighty men. (1ïṡẄChronicles 11:32) In (2ïṡẄSamuel 23:31) he is called ABI-ALBON. (B.C. 1053.)
